highlights: AI agent systems are making significant strides with new capabilities for auditable scientific discovery, industrial automation (CAD), and enhanced memory architectures that dramatically improve long-horizon task performance.

Major model advancements include OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol, pushing boundaries in coding and scientific reasoning, and Google's AMIE, demonstrating physician-level performance in complex medical diagnosis.

The AI infrastructure ecosystem is rapidly evolving with custom LLM inference chips (OpenAI/Broadcom Jalapeño), new security tool suites, and expanded API capabilities (Google Gemini Managed Agents) that streamline development and deployment.

agents.title: Prompt-to-Paper: Agentic AI System for Bioinformatics
agents.summary: Introduces Prompt-to-Paper, a multi-agent framework that generates scientific manuscripts grounded in verifiable literature and executes real bioinformatics experiments, improving quality assessment and reducing fabrication.

agents.title: FirstResearch: Auditable Question Formation for LLM Scientific Discovery Agents
agents.summary: Introduces FirstResearch, a framework for LLM scientific discovery agents that generates auditable research questions through structured Research Question Certificates, exposing mechanisms, assumptions, and falsifiable hypotheses.

agents.title: Memory in the Loop: In-Process Retrieval as ExtendedWorking Memory for Language Agents
agents.summary: Explores in-process retrieval for language agents, demonstrating that a sub-millisecond in-process memory store significantly reduces redundant actions and improves recall, turning memory into extended working memory.

models.title: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
models.summary: OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 Sol, a next-generation model featuring enhanced capabilities in coding, science, and cybersecurity, coupled with its most advanced safety stack for cutting-edge AI applications.

models.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
models.summary: New research published in Nature demonstrates that Google's conversational AI system, AMIE, matches primary care physicians in complex disease management, indicating a major step for medical AI.

models.title: Foundation Models for Automatic CAD Generation
models.summary: Presents LLMForge, a multi-model text-to-CAD framework with JSON-schema validation and iterative refinement, demonstrating compact instruction-tuned models can achieve high mesh success rates for parametric 3D designs.

tools.title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
tools.summary: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip specifically designed for LLM inference, aiming to significantly improve performance, efficiency, and scalability across AI systems.

tools.title: Daybreak: Tools for securing every organization in the world
tools.summary: OpenAI introduces new Daybreak tools, including Codex Security and GPT-5.5-Cyber, to enable organizations to efficiently find, validate, and patch vulnerabilities at scale, enhancing cybersecurity posture.

tools.title: Expanding Managed Agents in Gemini API: background tasks, remote MCP and more
tools.summary: Google announces expanded capabilities for Managed Agents in Gemini API, including background tasks and remote MCP, empowering developers to build more reliable and production-ready AI agents.

companies.title: HP Inc. launches Frontier strategic partnership with OpenAI
companies.summary: HP Inc. is scaling its OpenAI Frontier partnership to integrate AI across customer experiences, software development, and enterprise operations, signaling a significant enterprise-wide AI deployment.

companies.title: Australian Payments Plus moves faster with ChatGPT and Codex
companies.summary: Australian Payments Plus is leveraging ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to accelerate operations, enhance quality, and manage payments complexity, integrating AI while maintaining human oversight.

companies.title: MUFG aims to become AI-native with OpenAI
companies.summary: MUFG is adopting ChatGPT Enterprise to transform into an AI-native organization, improving internal workflows and delivering new AI-powered financial services at scale.

learning.title: New York City educators and industry leaders gathered at Google’s offices to shape the future of AI in classrooms.
learning.summary: Google hosted an AI summit for NYC educators and industry leaders to shape the future of AI in classrooms, fostering collaboration on integrating AI into K-12 education.

learning.title: Check out real-life AI prototypes from the Futures Lab.
learning.summary: University of Waterloo students are developing real-life AI prototypes, such as sign language tutors, through the Futures Lab, showcasing innovative applications and educational impact.

learning.title: Ask an AI expert: What exactly is the full stack?
learning.summary: A Google expert provides a clear explanation of what it means to take a full-stack approach to AI, offering foundational understanding for developers and practitioners.
